Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Chaim]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Chaim is a large man and an advisor to the Mayor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Chaim is the Mayor’s advisor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Chaim is Orlina's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Chaim is the son of Moseth and was an advisor to the Mayor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Chaim is a captive whose hands were tied with hemp rope.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Chaim is a person from Myria who stands among the villagers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Chaim poked his face into the canvas and asked what the Gate was.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Chaim is a leader or figure of authority for the Myrians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Chaim is a Myrian who escaped captivity.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Chaim is a person Leah knows.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
